method: For all 125 weapon-library-sourced Track-2 events: nearest marker delta, nearest Track-1 event start delta + its preset family, velocity envelope phase at that instant.
convergentValidationNote: The 3 non-confirmed-kill events (t2_e103 at 180.897s, t2_e104 at 181.765s, t2_e105 at 184.067s) match exactly the three counterexamples independently identified by Codex in project-audio-forensics.md (155.9558/180.897383/181.764916s plus a 4th at 184.067216s). Likely a rapid-fire/held-shot section where multiple gunshots occur within one continuous video event rather than at a cut.
velocityPhaseNote: 122/125 (97.6%) weapon-SFX events start exactly at velocity envelope point index 0 (the events own start, i.e. the fast-entry point) -- this extends and confirms the earlier fast-entry finding (previously only checked on 25 impact events) across the FULL 125-event corpus. The 2 non-index-0 cases and 1 no-envelope case correspond to the same counterexample cluster above.
